fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing software company with strong revenue and earnings expansion, but trades at a high valuation and has thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 18.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% show significant top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Strong gross margins of 79.9% indicate efficient service delivery.
Healthy free cash flow of $936.73M supports operations and potential investments.
Analyst consensus is 'strong_buy' with a mean target price suggesting potential upside.
Current ratio of 3.40 and quick ratio of 3.29 indicate strong short-term liquidity.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 561.65 and Forward P/E of 78.98 represent a very high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and profit margin of 3.7% are thin, indicating high operating expenses relative to revenue.
Return on assets of -0.2% suggests inefficient use of assets.
Beta of 1.29 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Datadog recently reported its first US$1 billion quarter and raised its 2026 outlook, signaling strong demand and continued growth. This positive momentum was further highlighted by inclusion in Dan Ives' AI ETF picks, suggesting analyst confidence in the company's trajectory. With an upcoming earnings date on August 6th, investors are weighing the implications of this strong performance and elevated outlook.
